features: 100% Pure Rose Oil – AVD Organics offers pure rose oil that is steam-distilled, unadulterated, and therapeutic grade – ideal for diffusers, aromatherapy, and DIY beauty.
Rose Essential Oil – Deeply hydrating and naturally antioxidant-rich, leaving your skin smooth, fresh, and beautifully radiant.
Perfect for Aromatherapy – A calming rose aromatherapy essential oil with a floral, soothing scent that promotes relaxation, reduces stress, and uplifts mood.
Multi-Purpose Use – Premium-quality essential oils rose, perfect for use in soap making, candle making, massage oils, perfumes, and diffuser oils fragrance rose
Premium Therapeutic Grade – Sustainably sourced and carefully bottled, our rose oil ensures purity, potency, and long-lasting fragrance for all your wellness and home needs.
